{{Quote|And I, too, have sensed trouble brewing among the majority of the population of ''Kulthis''—the third planet of this star system...|Darth Vader|<ref name="annual" />}}
'''Kulthis''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Belderone system/Legends|Belderone system]] that was the site of a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] base during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. The third planet in the [[Star system/Legends|system]], Kulthis became a target of the [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord]] [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] around [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]], who began to amp up the production of [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[All Terrain Armored Transport/Legends|AT-AT]] [[Walker/Legends|walkers]] on nearby [[Belderone/Legends|Belderone]] in preparation for an assault on the world. However, the Rebel base on Kulthis launched several [[Starfighter/Legends|fighter]] [[Squadron/Legends|squadrons]] in a pre-emptive strike on Belderone, destroying the Imperial threat.<ref name="annual" /> During the era of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]], Kulthis and Belderone became the site of [[Stenax]] settlements, although [[New Republic Intelligence]] was unaware of what interest the Stenaxes could possibly have had in the worlds.<ref name="gamer1">{{GamerCite|1|The University of Sanbra Guide to Intelligent Life: The Marvel Series}}</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
Kulthis was mentioned in [[Star Wars Annual (1977) 3|''Star Wars Annual'' (1977) 3]], written by [[Mary Jo Duffy]] and released in [[1983]].<ref name="annual" />
